Also has a sub-specialty in domestic violence counseling for abusers and anger management. 1675 SW Marlow Avenue Suite 110 Portland, OR 97225 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-7pm, Friday 9am-5pm.
